font-family: avenir !important; font-size: 14px !important; color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Is Data Processing taking
place in the EU?

div.style: font-family: avenir !important; font-size: 14px !important; color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Does the data relate
to human subjects?

div.style: font-family: avenir !important; font-size: 14px !important; color: black !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p: No need for a GDPR DPIA

div.style: font-family: avenir !important; font-size: 14px !important; color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Is data
obtained from 3rd party
sources ?

div.style: font-family: avenir !important; font-size: 14px !important; color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Obtain data access and data use conditions
from data provider

div.style: font-family: avenir !important; font-size: 14px !important; color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Can the data lead
to subject identification ?
